content.en:
Ye Tian tried to break through again, but he still couldn't break the shackles, this shackle seemed to be impossible to break through, and it was useless to impact countless times.

"If you can't even break through to the Eternal Dao Realm, let alone break through to the Eternal Dao Realm!"

Ye Tian muttered.

At present, the only places that have a relationship with the Eternal Dao Realm are the Ancient Abyss Realm and the Mythical Valley, but the Ancient Abyss Realm does not know when it will come to the Void Realm, and it is impossible to count on the Ancient Abyss Realm for the time being.

Then, only the Valley of Myths remains.

......

"That mythical spirit in the Mythical Valley is suspected to be comparable to the Eternal Dao Realm, but in fact it may not have reached the Eternal Dao Realm, maybe with my current strength, with multiple replica bodies and some innate primordial treasures, it is possible to drag that Mythical Spirit for a while, so as to spy on the situation of that Mythical Spirit Territory. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

He didn't know what the success rate would be, but he could at least give it a try.

So, this day.

Each of Ye Tian's seven replica bodies carried a large number of innate primordial treasures, and the abilities of these innate primordial treasures were all developed by him, just to hold back the mythical spirit for a while.

Valley of Myths.

The strongest mythical spirit territory.

Ye Tian entered here, and the spirit of mythology immediately dispatched.

Rumble!!!!!

The opponent's eyes contained terrifying power, and he was directly bombarded with the power of his eyes.

And this time, Ye Tian resisted.

"Kill!"

The six replica bodies burned life to urge the Eternal Dao incarnation body, and the ten percent perfect Eternal Sequence was suppressed by the Dao rules, and one by one the innate primordial treasures were urged.

In an instant, the mythical spirit was trapped.

Rumble!!!!

The hands of the spirit of myths kept clapping, and with each attack, Ye Tian's body cracked, and one by one the innate primordial treasures were shattered.

The gap in strength is still too big!

However, at this time, Ye Tian's seventh copy body directly broke into the other party's territory lair.

Soon.

He saw a mythical spirit object, and the energy it contained was very terrifying, far exceeding that of other mythical spirit objects.

"Good stuff, take it!"

After Ye Tian took away this innate spirit object, he also found a high-quality Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rule item and took it away.

At this time.

In this lair of mythical spirits, Ye Tian also saw dense cracks, and the aura that spread from the cracks was very unfamiliar.

"Could it be that these rifts are passages to the Void?"

Ye Tian was curious.

Before he had time to think, his other replica bodies were almost unable to carry it.

No matter what, go over and take a look, it's a big deal to lose this replica body.

Rumble!

Ye Tian went into one of the cracks.

Immediately, he defended himself with the rules of the Eternal Sequence to the Dao.

Passing through the rift was like passing through a spatial passage, and the terrifying spatial power bombarded his body, all of which were blocked by his Eternal Supreme Dao incarnation body and the Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rules.

I don't know how long it took, but he finally came out of the crack.

......

"Where is this?"

Ye Tian came to a strange ruin, and there were no living creatures around.

He tried to connect with the replicating body in the void, and he was able to do so, but it took a while, and his perception was extremely vague.

"Just be able to get in touch!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

The other side.

Ye Tian's six replica bodies began to evacuate, otherwise if they all fell, those innate primordial treasures would be lost, and the loss would be huge.

Fortunately, his ability to save his life was okay, and he retreated while fighting, and successfully withdrew from the territory of the Mythical Spirit and kept those innate original treasures.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian began to explore this unknown and mysterious place.

"Let's explore the surroundings first!"

Ye Tian first re-copied a replica body, and then let this replica body converge his aura to explore the surroundings.

He began to become cautious, after all, this was an unknown place, and he might encounter the existence of the Eternal Dao Realm.

Judging from the personality of this piece of heaven and earth, it should be higher than the Void Domain, but it is not too high, at most it is just a grade.

But even if it is only one grade higher, the powerhouses here will be much higher, there will definitely be an Eternal Dao realm, and even the powerhouses of the Eternal Dao will be many, many more.

Time passes.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to finally see a city.

This city is very large, and there are also large arrays arranged, these large arrays contain the rules of the Eternal Sequence Dao, at least they are also arranged by the Eternal Dao powerhouse.

Ye Tian observed for a while, and after feeling that there was no danger, he entered this city.

This city contained a powerful formation that could suppress his strength, and the spatial strength here was so high that it was difficult for even the Mythical Dao Realm to cause great damage.

After Ye Tian came in, he found that there were many legendary Dao realms and even mythical Dao realms here, but there were very few powerhouses of the Eternal Dao realm.

Of course, there are also weak Supreme Dao realm creatures here, all of whom are doing some chores and so on.

In addition, there are different races here, so he entered here without attracting much attention.

The city is called Guro City.

Ye Tian stayed in Guluo City for a while, listened to the conversations of other powerhouses, and gradually got to know this place.

Guluo City belongs to the Ogu Kingdom, and the most powerful existence in the Ogu Kingdom is the Lord of the Ogu Kingdom.

In addition, there is a currency that is prevalent here, the ancient coin, which is refined from a special metal and the rules of the eternal sequence to the Dao, and one ancient coin can buy many treasures.

And underneath the augocoins, there are various currencies that can be converted with the augocoins.

Of course, the powerhouses of the level of the Mythical Dao Realm naturally use the Ancient Coins.

Ye Tian took out some of the resources on his body and exchanged them for some ancient coins, otherwise there would be no way to buy anything here.

After having the ancient coin, Ye Tian bought a copy of the information.

This piece of information includes the information of the major treasures, the major forces and the powerful in the ancient country, which is very detailed and worth two ancient coins.

After Ye Tian browsed this information, he understood the Agu Kingdom.

According to the information that Ye Tian has now, after the mythical Dao realm is the Eternal Daohua, the Eternal Dao is divided into the early stage, the middle stage and the late stage, Ye Tian is now in the middle stage of the Eternal Dao Realm, and there is only one part away from the later stage.

And after the eternity to the Dao, it is the eternity to the Dao realm.

For example, there are many Eternal Dao Realm existences in the Aogu Realm, and the Augur Realm Lord is the top existence in the Eternal Dao Realm, and his strength is far beyond the Eternal Dao Realm.

"The Lord of the Agu Kingdom and the Lord of the Qingyuan Kingdom should all be the masters of a country. "

Ye Tian said darkly.
